description: The paris hilton for men is is masculine and sophisticated. The top notes are blend of fig leaf and green mango. The middle notes include white sage, juniper and basil. Base notes sign off with cedarwood, cucumber and amber. Paris Hilton for men is recommended for daytime wear.Quantity: 100 ml CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
